steps.title: Read the graphed line
steps.content: The line shown is $y=f(x)+19$. Using points $(0,4)$ and $(2,0)$, the slope is $-2$ and the equation is $y=-2x+4$.

steps.title: Match to the form with positive $c,d$
steps.content: Rewrite as $f(x)=-15-2x=-d-cx$ with $d=15,\ c=2$ (both positive). That matches choice A — A is correct.
